mapper.sql: select id, customer_id, task_no, source_type, source_remark, total_count, printed_count, status, remark, del_flag, del_by, del_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from sb_asset_print_task
mapper.select: where customer_id = #{customerId} and task_no = #{taskNo} and (del_flag = 0 or del_flag is null) limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into sb_asset_print_task (id, customer_id, task_no, source_type, source_remark, total_count, printed_count, status, remark, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{id}, #{customerId}, #{taskNo}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceRemark}, #{totalCount}, #{printedCount}, #{status}, #{remark}, 0, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: update sb_asset_print_task set del_flag = 1, del_by = #{delBy}, del_time = now(), update_by = #{delBy}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
